name: codegraph_get_call_graph
description: Maps function call relationships showing callers and callees. USE WHEN: tracing execution flow, understanding function usage, finding dead code, or debugging. Returns nodes with name, type, file path, and line range for each caller/callee in the chain. Use depth to control how many levels to traverse. Requires uri and line parameters.

depth.description: How many levels deep to traverse the call graph

direction.description: Direction: 'callers' (who calls this), 'callees' (what this calls), or 'both'

summary.description: Return a condensed summary for large call graphs

uri.description: The file URI containing the function (e.g. file:///Users/me/project/src/main.rs)
